name: 20 MG Tada lafil Tablets
about: 20 MG Tada lafil Tablets are a type of general medicine used to treat erectile dysfunction in men. These tablets come in a physical form of tablets with a dosage of 20 mg and are manufactured in India. The dosage guidelines for these tablets should be followed as per the doctors suggestion. To ensure the quality of the medicine, it should be stored in a dry and cool place. Each box contains 1 x 4 tablets that are packed with utmost care to prevent damage during transportation.

faq.q: What is the dosage of 20 MG Tada lafil Tablets?
faq.a: The dosage of 20 MG Tada lafil Tablets is 20 mg per tablet.

faq.q: What are these tablets used for?
faq.a: These tablets are used to treat erectile dysfunction in men.

faq.q: How should I store these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: How many tablets are there in a box?
Can I take these tablets without consulting a doctor?
faq.a: No, you should always consult a doctor before taking these tablets.
